title: naqab #5344
definition:
1) to pierce, perforate, bore, appoint
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to pierce, bore
        1a2) to prick off, designate
    1b) (Niphal) to be pricked off, be designated, be specified
 2) (Qal) to curse, blaspheme
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to pierce, perforate, bore, appoint
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to pierce, bore
        1a2) to prick off, designate
    1b) (Niphal) to be pricked off, be designated, be specified
 2) (Qal) to curse, blaspheme

    NASB:  to pierce
